name: Lloc de Menorca (zoo and educational farm)
description: A wildlife haven just off the Me-1 where little ones feed the pygmy goats, walk among free-roaming lemurs and, in summer, cool off in the water area. A full day of nature without leaving the centre of the island.

highlights: feed the pygmy goats and see ring-tailed lemurs roaming semi-free
round off the visit with the 'Talaquàtic' water area and the playground (in summer)
have a picnic in the picnic area; buy your ticket online at a discount
